---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

Review this repository as a security tool.

Flag issues that affect:

- identity validation;
- group or role mapping;
- dataset policy;
- raw XQL authorization;
- audit completeness or sensitive logging;
- XSIAM credential handling;
- dependency vulnerabilities;
- GitHub Actions permissions;
- prompt-injection or unsafe agent tool behavior.

Avoid cosmetic-only feedback.
